name: @jofr/capacitor-media-session
description: Capacitor plugin for media notifications and platform media keys as well as background audio playback
author: Jonas <jofr@vivaldi.net>

scripts.test: docker build -t capacitor-media-session-test . && docker run --rm capacitor-media-session-test
scripts.verify: npm run verify:android && npm run verify:web
scripts.verify:android: cd android && ./gradlew clean build test && cd ..
scripts.lint: npm run eslint && npm run prettier -- --check && npm run swiftlint -- lint
scripts.fmt: npm run eslint -- --fix && npm run prettier -- --write && npm run swiftlint -- --fix --format
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run docgen && tsc && rollup -c rollup.config.js
